title: Create a duration column

posts.author: kemaneo (Matteo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
I’d like to create a column to keep track of durations (MM:SS), but I can’t find a way to do it.
I have the standard plan so I don’t have access to formulas, but surely there has to be a way to do such a simple thing?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kemaneo - the standard plan is a bit limiting. The easiest way to do this would be with a Time Tracking column but again, not available on Standard. I am not sure how you would complete this on Standard without utilizing 3rd party software to manage it (ie: General Caster or make.com). If upgrading to PRO is an option that would be the path of least resistance

Mark
